# onelogin_saml_app (Resource)

Manages a OneLogin SAML App.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# SAML app with typed configuration
resource "onelogin_saml_app" "example" {
  name         = "My SAML App"
  connector_id = 110016

  configuration {
    signature_algorithm = "SHA-256"
    acs                 = "https://app.example.com/saml/acs"
    audience            = "https://app.example.com"
  }

  provisioning = {
    enabled = true
  }

  # Map user attributes into the SAML assertion
  parameters = [
    {
      param_key_name            = "email"
      label                     = "Email"
      user_attribute_mappings   = "email"
      include_in_saml_assertion = true
    },
    {
      param_key_name            = "firstname"
      label                     = "First Name"
      user_attribute_mappings   = "firstname"
      include_in_saml_assertion = true
    },
  ]
}

# SSO metadata is populated by the API
output "metadata_url" {
  value = onelogin_saml_app.example.sso.metadata_url
}

output "acs_url" {
  value = onelogin_saml_app.example.sso.acs_url
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `connector_id` (Number) The connector ID for the app type.
- `name` (String) The name of the app.

### Optional

- `allow_assumed_signin` (Boolean) Whether assumed sign-in is allowed. Defaults to false.
- `brand_id` (Number) The brand ID for the app.
- `configuration` (Block, Optional) SAML-specific configuration settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--configuration))
- `description` (String) A description of the app.
- `notes` (String) Notes about the app.
- `parameters` (Attributes List) Application parameters. Order matters — elements are matched positionally between config and state. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--parameters))
- `policy_id` (Number) The security policy ID.
- `provisioning` (Attributes) Provisioning settings for the app. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--provisioning))
- `role_ids` (Set of Number) Set of role IDs that can access this app.
- `visible` (Boolean) Whether the app is visible to users. Defaults to true.

### Read-Only

- `auth_method` (Number) The authentication method.
- `created_at` (String) When the app was created.
- `icon_url` (String) The URL of the app's icon.
- `id` (Number) The unique identifier of the app.
- `sso` (Attributes) SAML SSO settings (read-only, populated by the API). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sso))
- `tab_id` (Number) The tab ID.

<a id="nestedblock--configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `configuration`

Optional:

- `acs` (String) The Assertion Consumer Service (ACS) URL where the SAML assertion is sent.
- `audience` (String) The audience restriction / SP Entity ID.
- `certificate_id` (Number) The certificate ID to use for SAML signing.
- `provider_arn` (String) The AWS provider ARN (for AWS SAML apps).
- `recipient` (String) The recipient URL for the SAML assertion.
- `relaystate` (String) The relay state URL.
- `signature_algorithm` (String) The SAML signature algorithm (e.g., "SHA-1", "SHA-256", "SHA-384", "SHA-512").
- `subdomain` (String) The subdomain for catalog SAML connectors (e.g., LogicMonitor).


<a id="nestedatt--parameters"></a>
### Nested Schema for `parameters`

Required:

- `param_key_name` (String) The parameter key name.

Optional:

- `attributes_transformations` (String) Attribute transformation rules.
- `default_values` (String) Default value for the parameter.
- `include_in_saml_assertion` (Boolean) Whether to include this parameter in the SAML assertion.
- `label` (String) The display label for the parameter.
- `provisioned_entitlements` (Boolean) Whether this parameter uses provisioned entitlements.
- `skip_if_blank` (Boolean) Skip this parameter if value is blank.
- `user_attribute_macros` (String) Macro expression for user attribute.
- `user_attribute_mappings` (String) User attribute to map to this parameter.
- `values` (String) The parameter value.

Read-Only:

- `param_id` (Number) The parameter ID assigned by OneLogin.


<a id="nestedatt--provisioning"></a>
### Nested Schema for `provisioning`

Optional:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether provisioning is enabled.


<a id="nestedatt--sso"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sso`

Read-Only:

- `acs_url` (String) The Assertion Consumer Service URL.
- `certificate` (Attributes) The SAML signing certificate. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sso--certificate))
- `issuer` (String) The SAML issuer URL.
- `metadata_url` (String) The SAML metadata URL.
- `sls_url` (String) The Single Logout Service URL.

<a id="nestedatt--sso--certificate"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sso.certificate`

Read-Only:

- `id` (Number) The certificate ID.
- `name` (String) The certificate name.
- `value` (String, Sensitive) The certificate value (PEM-encoded).
